query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN address REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as endereco_valido,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as endereco_invalido
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '';

  SUM(CASE WHEN address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as endereco_invalido
